display_text: Force Boots, Cost: 0: Neutral item providing +115 Movement Speed and +30 Health Regeneration. The active Force ability pushes the target 750 units in the direction they are facing, dispelling if cast on an ally. The Speed Unlock passive completely removes the movement speed limit for the wearer. Stats: CD: 8s, Mana: 75, Push Length: 750, Push Duration: 0.5s, MS: +115, HP Regen: +30.
